payload.title: Serve column config + render from it (web)
payload.description: Add column config to /api/meta (src/server.js ~743). Remove hardcoded BOARD_COLUMNS, OPEN_STATUSES, STATUS_LABELS from src/web/app.js and render columns/labels/dot-colors from the config (per-column color stored in config, applied inline instead of CSS .dot.<status> classes). Drawer status select reads from config too.
